'''Havriso Looruya''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yir Tangee/Legends|Yir Tangee]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], he was a member of the [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalist Committee]].<ref name="HNN 49">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|news/13328_1.html|Palpatine forms Loyalist Committee}}</ref> However, fellow senator [[Onaconda Farr/Legends|Onaconda Farr]] accused him of holding ties to the Confederacy, and after a [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] investigation confirmed it, Looruya was censured and removed from the Senate, with Farr taking his place on the Committee.<ref name="HNN 54" /><ref name="HNN 55">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|news/1359_4.html|Senator Farr Named to Loyalist Committee}}</ref>
